metadata.description: Costory FinOps skills for AI agents: query, virtual dimensions, dashboards, reports (DIGEST), recipes, plus events, alerts, recommendations, forecast, governance, optimization, and multi-step playbooks — over the Costory MCP tool surface.

plugins.name: costory
plugins.description: Costory FinOps plugin: agent skills for query investigation, virtual dimensions (custom cost axes), dashboard and report creation with context-first widget inheritance, and DIGEST workflows with preview and delivery safety.
